description:
Audio Library is one of the most trusted platforms dedicated to providing Background and No Copyright Music for content creators.

✨ *FREE DOWNLOAD HERE:*  https://audiolibrary.com.co/blaudiss/dreams-of-you


✅ *HOW DO I MONETIZE MY VIDEO WITH THIS TRACK?* 

You can use this song for *FREE* in any YouTube video and monetize it—just make sure to include the following in your description *(copy and paste into your description)* 👇

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
Music: Dreams of You by BlauDisS https://soundcloud.com/blaudiss
License: Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0
Free Download / Stream: https://audiolibrary.com.co/blaudiss/dreams-of-you
Music promoted by Audio Library: https://youtu.be/nr32COcc90s
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––


🎶 *ABOUT THE SONG* 

Experience the ethereal beauty of "Dreams of You" by BlauDisS, a masterpiece of *ambient* textures designed to elevate your creative projects. This track offers a *relaxing* atmosphere that fits perfectly as *background music* for travel vlogs or visual storytelling. Let the *calm* melodies guide your audience through a journey of *serenity* and peace.


🎶 *KEY MUSICAL SEGMENTS FROM THE SONG* 

0:00 - Soft Beginnings: Gentle synth washes set a serene tone.
0:13 - Ethereal Entrance: Airy melodies float over a pulsing base.
0:40 - Rhythmic Flow: Subdued pulses add a steady, calming energy.
1:08 - Deep Immersion: Rich textures create a vast, dreamlike space.
1:35 - Melodic Shimmer: Delicate tones dance across the soundscape.
1:56 - Serene Fade: Soft echoes linger as the track gently ends.


🎧 *LISTEN ON YOUR FAVORITE PLATFORMS* 

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0dwgQsdhmSVKJAjlp1WDwi
iTunes: https://geo.music.apple.com/co/album/_/1836256579
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=91qZIX9SyKs


👋 *GET IN TOUCH WITH BLAUDISS* 

blaudiss@gmail.com
https://facebook.com/blaudiss
https://instagram.com/blaudiss


⚠️ *HOW TO USE THIS MUSIC FOR FREE (GUIDELINES)* 

-  You must include full credits in your video description.
-  You cannot claim the music as your own.
-  You cannot sell, license, or distribute the music in any form.
-  You cannot remove or alter any part of the credits.
-  You cannot use this music as background for your own musical compositions without the artist’s explicit consent.
-  If you wish to use this music in projects outside of YouTube, you must obtain permission from the artist.
-  Failure to comply with these guidelines may result in a copyright claim or strike.
-  If you have any questions or need further clarification, please contact the artist directly.


🔥 *MORE FREE MUSIC FROM AUDIO LIBRARY* 

Spotify playlists: https://spoti.fi/3XTlK4h
Official Releases: https://www.youtube.com/c/audiolibraryplus


❤️ *GET IN TOUCH WITH AUDIO LIBRARY*
